queries.question: What mobile banking customers use biometric authentication and what internet banking customers also use it?
queries.sql:
SELECT Customers.FullName
FROM Customers
WHERE (Customers.Digital_Solutions = "Mobile Banking App" OR Customers.Digital_Solutions = "Internet Banking Platform") AND Customers.Sign_in_Options = "Biometric Authentication"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?customers p:Digital_Solutions ?digital_solutions_w .
  ?customers p:Digital_Solutions ?digital_solutions_w2 .
  ?customers p:Sign_in_Options ?sign_in_options_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?digital_solutions_w) = "Mobile Banking App" || STR(?digital_solutions_w2) = "Internet Banking Platform")) && STR(?sign_in_options_w) = "Biometric Authentication"))
}

queries.question: Show mobile banking customers and internet banking customers that use biometric authentication.
queries.sql:
SELECT Customers.FullName
FROM Customers
WHERE Customers.Digital_Solutions = "Mobile Banking App" OR Customers.Digital_Solutions = "Internet Banking Platform" AND Customers.Sign_in_Options = "Biometric Authentication"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?customers p:Digital_Solutions ?digital_solutions_w .
  ?customers p:Digital_Solutions ?digital_solutions_w2 .
  ?customers p:Sign_in_Options ?sign_in_options_w .
  FILTER((STR(?digital_solutions_w) = "Mobile Banking App" || (STR(?digital_solutions_w2) = "Internet Banking Platform" && STR(?sign_in_options_w) = "Biometric Authentication")))
}
